meaning: <日>n.(日本大学内由一名教授、一名副教授、数名助手和技术员组成的)教研组
examples: Perhaps the most cunning use of an evolutionary algorithm, though, is by Dr. Koza himself.
Koza found he could evolve a program to achieve this control.
Perhaps the most cunning use of an evolutionary algorithm, though, is by Dr Koza himself.
Koza has outstanding track record of a 38% average annual return for the past five years.
